must_detect.matched_text:
Northline Digital plc — Confidential Incident Report (UK MAR) — not for external distribution.
On 06/06, our crypto custody pilot and ESG emissions ledger (“Project GREENBR I D G E”) experienced a ransomware encryption event in the non‑production shard.
The attack restricted access to tokenised carbon credit custody nodes and the Scope‑3 dataset; no retail clients hold wallets on this shard, but key tests are paused.
Preliminary estimate: a 4–6% deferral of Q3 revenues due to delay in the stablecoin deposit service heads of terms with Finsbury Vale Bank (minimum fee £0.9–1.1m p.a.), which is not yet announced.
This may constitute inside information under UK M A R; a draft R I S announcement is being prepared and the insider list is being created per Article 18, pending materiality sign‑off.
Until publication via a UK RIS, a dealing blackout applies to PDMRs and relevant staff; please observe existing information barriers and avoid selective disclosure in vendor forums.
Direction given by Sir Alastair Keene (CFO) and Ms. Priya Halbrook (Head of InfoSec); contact channel: compliance@northline-digital.co.uk for any wall‑crossing requests.
Forensics engaged: Penhurst Cyber Ltd; we have isolated “vault‑alpha” (Asset‑ID ND‑CUST‑00X) and rotated the HSM seeds (ref: H S M‑R O T/47a).
Rivergate Ventures LLP has been approached for potential wall‑crossing in relation to a small placing to fund remediation; no terms have been communicated and no one is cleansed.
draft url (internal): htt ps://intra.northline‑plc.local/rns/draft?doc=ND P%2F47a&tick=SR‑0 2 9 1‑B — do not forward outside the clean team.
Training note: our “Insider Pathways” webinar uses crypto market vocabulary for education only and does not involve inside information or deal communications.
We do not currently assess this incident as a material adverse change under the draft subscription agreement for Project GREENBR I D G E, subject to final legal review.
Monitoring: third‑party blogs have speculated about a “Northline breach”; these posts cite public sources and do not reflect our internal status page; please refrain from comment.
Ops update (lowercase): run patch rollout wed 10:00, restore esg ledger from snapshot‑03, re‑test carbon token mint/burn controls, update dealing code notice.
Recordkeeping: maintain delay rationale under DTR 2.5, update the insider list (Sir Alastair Keene; Ms. Priya Halbrook; Mr. T. Marden, dealing code officer), and log all access to the draft RNS.
